name: 6"x15" Drawer Flatware Organizer - Brightroom™: Clear PETG, In-Drawer Kitchen Storage, Contemporary Style
description:
Give your kitchen tools the perfect storage space with the 6-Inch x 15-Inch Drawer Flatware Organizer from Brightroom™. Made of see-through plastic, this flatware organizer is 2.6 inches high, 6 inches wide, and 15 inches deep. Place it conveniently in your drawer to store and access cooking utensils, such as spatulas, ladles and more.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
